understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile (+) by navigating the grid, using horizontal movement and falling in the direction of gravity, while avoiding hazards such as spikes and using clicks to remove breakable blocks that block the path.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement could only be done horizontally with MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT, after which gravity caused the player to fall until landing on a solid tile. Clicks removed breakable blocks at targeted positions without moving the player or advancing turn-based hazards. Undo could revert a previous action. Hazards like spikes ended the attempt if landed upon, and the level was structured to require careful manipulation of falls and block removal to progress toward the goal.
